name: Rune It Out
short_description: Rune it Out is a multiplayer PVP game but you can also play with AI. In the game, you combine different runes to cast spells that will change the map and turn your friends to dust.
detailed_description:
Check out My NEWEST Game!



About the Game

Rune it Out is a multiplayer PVP game but you can also play with AI.

In the game, you combine different runes to cast spells that will change the map and turn your friends to dust.

A great dwarven Smith was born in a magical world. He was so skilled in smithing that he felt limited by physical means alone. To surpass these limitations, he incorporated magic into his craft and invented a new object called a rune. By combining runes, he developed a new method of casting magic, which he called "Rune Casting." Soon after, an arena was built where the most skilled "Rune mages" competed for fame and mana.

  • Multiplayer and Singleplayer(AI)

  • Multiple character choices

  • Combine Different runes to create amazing spells

  • Fully Interactive map

- Progressing Grimoire (Spell Book)

Kill other "Rune Mages" to gain their "rune mana" and use it to unlock new spells in a grimoire

- Chanting

Type your spells as fast as you can. Otherwise, your RuneMage also won't chant them fast.

- Miscasting :

Concentrate on casting your spells. If you don't, you will miscast them!

Artefact Mode

Not long after, a new competition the "Artefact Battle" was invented, one in which multiple "Rune Mages" clashed their spells against each other to attain an Artefact.

- Clashing spells:

Try to counter the enemy spells as fast as possible

- Multiplayer PvP

- Mana:

Counter, the spells of your enemies or hit them with your own to acquire mana and Achieve Victory!
